name: sources catalog: generates a markdown document listing sources with their links
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sources-catalog.sh" --out out.md --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
grep -q '# Cloud-Architect Sources Catalog' out.md && grep -q 'https://' out.md && echo catalog-md 1>&2
